series_metadata.series_description: Record contains original blueprints, deed and abstracts, construction drawings and bid specifications, related correspondence, maintenance and asbestos reports; controlling board approvals; capital improvement plans including status reports; fund encumbrances; property value and square footage information; ADA modifications; and site location information, such as, meeting notes from each facility, drapery and color coordination, paneling and cost figures for upgrades and modifications to ODJFS owned facilities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 1 year after the property is sold, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 1 year after the property is sold, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
